patch.value: MCP TOOL_SCHEMA_BASE additionalProperties:true silently swallows typo'd top-level args
All narrow tool schemas inherit additionalProperties:true; a typo like fullChangedField (missing s) is ignored with no error, so agents silently get default behavior.
Either additionalProperties:false with a documented allow-list of known top-level keys, or a server-side warning on unexpected keys; a typo-arg test triggers warning/error; existing tests pass.
All narrow tool schemas inherit additionalProperties:true; a typo like fullChangedField (missing s) is ignored with no error, so agents silently get default behavior.
